bundles.title: Browser proof surfaces
bundles.description: Live UI and browser-test tasks for chat, trace, graph, notebook, upload, and room flows.
bundles.query: browser chat trace graph notebook upload room

tasks.title: Open room → #rooms/expositio-pulse mounts the public room page; back; Subscribe opens the modal
frame, five tabs, proof footer, read-only hint — and no Ops tab without ops=1
each tab swaps the main surface content
ops=1 in the hash query reveals the Ops tab and the ops panel
#/rooms/<slug> variant resolves to the same page
unknown slug renders an honest missing state, never relabeled demo data
tabs, proof link, and paper filters are keyboard-accessible
mobile room chrome stays clickable without clipped controls or trace overlap
subscribe button opens the modal; Escape closes it (no undismissable chrome)
scrim click also closes the modal
memory-mode subscribe is honest: success state carries the demo hint
invalid email is rejected inline, not silently accepted
BankerToolBench fresh-room contract: upload task inputs -> @nodeagent -> package verifier
real-app preview — Room NodeAgent fills the variance column (lock → CAS → release)
real-app preview — GTM research enrichment (source-backed CellPayload)
real-app preview — @nodeagent reconcile drives the sheet through chat (chat + sheet framing)
real-app preview — review mode: agent edits arrive as proposals, host approves
send renders an instant, stably-keyed, confirmed bubble
editing own message paints the new text in place
can send an artifact reference without extra text
chat artifact references open beside the primary work surface on desktop
mobile chat artifact references switch back to the work surface
dropping a file into chat uploads it and attaches a reference
paperclip upload attaches a file reference from the composer
pasting a file into the composer uploads it as a reference
@nodeagent quick chips replace /ask and /free as the taught public agent UX
seams exist and the demo grant starts at 20 credits
BURST: a 1000-run spike never drives the balance negative and fails closed
SUSTAINED: repeated load batches accumulate spend monotonically, balance stays bounded
MODE ORDERING: a fresh grant runs more quick tasks than deep tasks before exhaustion
RESET: reloading the demo restores the full grant (demo credits reset on reload)
UI: the Quick/Standard/Deep selector + balance render in the Room Home command center
UI: the status strip shows the demo credit balance chip
decision assistant summarizes a completed research run and pre-fills next actions
an uploaded plain sheet renders as an aligned dark work-surface grid, not the Excel-paper UI
uploaded workbook renders in the shared Sheet 1 grid, not the false Excel-paper UI
desktop public agent shows immediate progress, mutates artifacts, and keeps browser health clean
mobile terracotta prototype cards are operable, traceable, and overflow-safe
developer asks for NVIDIA finance research with SEC cross-check, observes loop engineering
developer observes richer streaming UX — plan card, progress bar, reasoning
research UpScaleX event presence and community engagement
Emilie builds a board update with metrics, milestones, and competitive landscape
Emilie researches her own market size and growth trajectory for board deck
Reni researches language learning market trends for pitch enrichment
LP enters Mark's shared room and runs independent diligence on MAI
LP researches UpScaleX fund track record before committing capital
Alan researches a potential deal using his Alibaba network context
Alan and Mark compare investment theses on a shared deal
judge asks for a quick company overview using web search
Alan researches cross-border e-commerce AI for UpScaleX thesis validation
Mark's former PE colleague refers a startup and creates a diligence room
second-degree connection does independent research on BeFreed before intro to Mark
agent recovers when a tool returns no results and tries an alternative
research AdsGency AI's rapid growth and ad optimization market
research Dimension Studios TikTok Shop AI and social commerce market
map UpScaleX event ecosystem and portfolio company showcase history
non-technical user asks a plain-English question and gets a clear answer
validate UpScaleX agentic commerce thesis with market data and portfolio evidence
user asks for a full LinkedIn deep dive on UpScaleX in one prompt
